candidates.why: Candidate provided, but it is explicitly non-current and therefore not total current assets.
Candidate provided, but it is a specific non-current/held-for-sale line, not total current assets.

candidates.row_label: Liabilities related to non-current assets held for sale
candidates.why: Candidate provided, but it is a liability line and not current assets.

variables.notes: No explicit total current assets line is visible on the Balance Sheet preview. Do not infer from subtotals or unrelated asset lines.

candidates.why: Direct balance-sheet cash line; preferred over cash-flow beginning/end cash rows for CHE.

candidates.row_label: Cash and cash equivalents at the end of reporting period
candidates.why: Matches the concept, but CHE should come from the balance sheet when available.

candidates.row_label: Cash and cash equivalents at the beginning of reporting period
candidates.why: Cash-flow beginning balance is not the best balance-sheet mapping for CHE.
Candidate provided, but it is explicitly non-current and therefore not total current liabilities.

variables.notes: No explicit total current liabilities line is visible on the Balance Sheet preview.
No clean short-term debt/current borrowings line is visible. Excluded lease-related rows per instructions, and avoided using broad liability totals or non-current debt lines.

candidates.why: Direct candidate for taxes payable/current tax liabilities, though values are blank in the preview.
Semantically also a tax-liability line and visibly populated, but less cleanly standard than the direct payable label.

variables.notes: Used a priority list: the direct payable label is preferred if populated in some years; the broader tax liability label is a fallback.

candidates.why: Direct total PPE line on the balance sheet; best match for PPEGT.

candidates.row_label: Right of Use Tangible Assets - Capital/Finance Lease - Gross
candidates.why: Tangible fixed assets but specifically lease-related and gross, so less preferred than the standard total PPE line.

candidates.row_label: Property, Plant and Equipment - Balancing value
candidates.why: Balancing line, not preferred when a clean reported PPE line exists.
Direct total assets line on the balance sheet.
Direct operating cash flow total; best match for OANCF.
